description: The table presents a hierarchical nomenclature for land cover/land use (LCLU) classification, specifically for Riparian Zones (RZ), structured according to MAES (Mapping and Assessment of Ecosystems and their Services) ecosystem types up to CODE Level 4. The table displays five columns: `Code Level 1 Description`, `Code Level 2 Description`, `Code Level 3/4 Description`, `Code Level 1-3`, and `Code Level 4`. The initial two rows (2.3.3 and 2.3.4) are a continuation of a higher-level category not fully displayed
